file.title: Ontology File
file.description: Select the ontology file to be imported (only supported files are listed).

OntologyLoadingSelectionService.name: Ontology source
OntologyLoadingSelectionService.description: Select the source from which the ontology will be loaded.

OntologyVersioningSelectionService.name: Ontology versioning strategy selection
OntologyVersioningSelectionService.description: Select the strategy that will be used to determine the version of the ontology.

pattern.title: Glob pattern
pattern.description: [Glob](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Glob_(programming)#Syntax) pattern matching files that will be imported into the database.

preview.title: Preview matching files
preview.description: When enabled, files matching the regex pattern will be displayed after submit:

files_list.title: List of all files:
files_list.help: List of all files available in the context.

files_preview.title: List of matching files:
files_preview.help: List of files that matched the pattern.
